
---
title: "Generalizing the Null Distribution of Univariate ODA to Imbalanced and Non-Directional Cases"
output: pdf_document
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{amsmath}
  - \usepackage{amssymb}
  - \usepackage{graphicx}
  - \usepackage{booktabs}
  - \usepackage{float}
fontsize: 11pt
geometry: margin=1in
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
```

# 1. Introduction

This document provides a complete derivation, empirical verification, and symbolic generalization of the null classification error distribution used in univariate optimal discriminant analysis (ODA). We generalize the work of Carmony, Yarnold, and Naeymi-Rad (1997) to include imbalanced binary classification problems and both directional and non-directional hypotheses.
